capabilities.title: Inverter Power
capabilities.change_summary: Turns the inverter on or off.
capabilities.support_notes: From Deye Modbus V1.19 one-phase doc; not yet confirmed on hardware.

capabilities.title: Energy Pattern
capabilities.change_summary: Chooses whether battery or load has first claim on PV.
capabilities.support_notes: From Deye Modbus V1.19 one-phase doc; not yet confirmed on hardware.

choices.label: Battery First
choices.description: PV charges the battery before serving load.

choices.label: Load First
choices.description: PV serves the load before charging.

capabilities.title: Solar Sell
capabilities.change_summary: Allows PV surplus to be sold to the grid.
capabilities.support_notes: From Deye Modbus V1.19 one-phase doc; not yet confirmed on hardware.

capabilities.title: Export Power Limit
capabilities.change_summary: Caps the power exported to the grid.
capabilities.support_notes: From Deye Modbus V1.19 one-phase doc; not yet confirmed on hardware.

capabilities.title: Grid Charging
capabilities.change_summary: Allows the battery to charge from the grid.
capabilities.support_notes: From Deye Modbus V1.19 one-phase doc; not yet confirmed on hardware.

capabilities.title: Generator Charging
capabilities.change_summary: Allows the battery to charge from the generator port.
capabilities.support_notes: From Deye Modbus V1.19 one-phase doc; not yet confirmed on hardware.

capabilities.title: Max Charge Current
capabilities.support_notes: From Deye Modbus V1.19 one-phase doc; not yet confirmed on hardware.

capabilities.title: Max Discharge Current
capabilities.support_notes: From Deye Modbus V1.19 one-phase doc; not yet confirmed on hardware.
